name: NuGet PLC Sabotage Logic Bombs (shanhai666)
description: 9 malicious NuGet packages with time-delayed logic bombs. Sharp7Extend sabotages Siemens S7 PLC write operations 80% of the time after random delays. Other packages terminate database processes with 20% probability. Designed to mimic intermittent hardware failures.

affected_packages.name: Sharp7Extend
affected_packages.note: Typosquat of Sharp7 (Siemens S7 PLC library). Sabotages PLC writes.

affected_packages.name: MCDbRepository
affected_packages.note: Database process termination logic bomb. Trigger: Aug 8, 2027.

remediation: Audit database and PLC communication code
Check for injected .Exec() and .BeginTran() extension methods
Verify PLC write operations are functioning correctly
Review SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SQLite connection code
